Sample message 
If you're 65 years or older, it's recommended you get a higher dose or adjuvanted flu vaccine, which helps create a stronger immune response. Talk to your doctor about flu vaccine options to help reduce your risk of flu and its potentially serious complications. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4ixyu9Q

Respiratory Illnesses 
Respiratory illnesses affect the lungs and airways. Get information on common causes, prevention actions, and current levels of illness in your community.
